mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.title AS "title", a.imgs AS "imgs", a.video AS "video", a.pdf AS "pdf", a.type AS "type", a.time AS "time", a.txType AS "txtype", a.name AS "name", a.size AS "size", a.miao AS "miao", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
`group`.name AS "group.name", `group`.idno AS "group.idno"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_group_dingshi( id, group_id, title, imgs, video, pdf, `type`, `time`, txType, `name`, `size`, miao, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{group.id}, #{title}, #{imgs}, #{video}, #{pdf}, #{type}, #{time}, #{txtype}, #{name}, #{size}, #{miao}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_group_dingshi SET group_id = #{group.id}, title = #{title}, imgs = #{imgs}, video = #{video}, pdf = #{pdf}, `type` = #{type}, `time` = #{time}, txType = #{txtype}, `name` = #{name}, `size` = #{size}, miao = #{miao}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
